wo-audit-god-dto-refinement.title: [S2-1.5] DTO Governance Refinement (Internal vs External)
wo-audit-god-dto-refinement.instruction_raw: Refine the God DTO decomposition plan by explicitly separating data structures into Internal, External, and Common DTOs. Ensure `SimulationState` attributes are migrated to these categorized DTOs and update `modules/simulation/api.py` accordingly.
